description: cyanorak ortholog group id (stable)
majority-vote product label across members — descriptive only
number of Prochlorococcus strains in the OG
number of Prochlorococcus member genes
representative gene chosen for mechanistic angles (MED4 if present else best-covered strain)
organism of the representative gene
number of treatment types with a significant response
treatments the family was measured in (coverage)
breadth / n_treatments_tested (coverage-normalized)
best within-experiment DE rank reached
largest |log2 fold change|
count of significant member×experiment×timepoint points
overall direction (up/down/mixed)
per-treatment direction dict
genera in the cyanorak OG (cyanobacteria-only by construction)
taxonomic level of the broadest eggnog group (Prochloraceae/Cyanobacteria/Bacteria)
genera present in the broadest eggnog group
whether the broadest group spans more than one genus
consensus gene symbol of broadest group (majority-vote) — corroborate with COG/domain
COG id of the broadest eggnog group (e.g. COG0316=iscA)
bacteria-wide / cyanobacteria-restricted / Prochlorococcus-restricted
flanking genes on the representative contig (names/products/categories/bp gap)
most common shared gene_category/pathway among the neighbors (excl. Unknown)
how many neighbors converge on that pathway (>=2 = coherent)
neighbor whose ortholog stays adjacent across multiple strains (synteny conservation)
co-expression cluster ids + names the rep belongs to (membership is real)
cluster enrichment label — about the cluster majority not this gene; caution
Tier1: characterized family/pathway with the most similar 17-strain presence-absence profile (Rosetta-stone); signal only for variably-present families

Tier1: top characterized families by correlation of the fine-grained per-(experiment×timepoint) log2FC vector (NOT the collapsed direction_by_treatment); correlate on shared measured datapoints + shape only
number of shared measured (experiment×timepoint) datapoints backing each co-response match
Tier1: neighbor that is same-strand+close AND conserved-adjacent across strains AND co-expressed (near-certain operonic partner)
Tier2: genes that are BOTH a genomic neighbor AND a co-expression cluster-mate (two angles agreeing)
Tier2: whether the rescued function fits the neighborhood/cluster context (flagged interpretation)
Tier2: agreement among SignalP / vesicle-proteome / PSORTb-Extracellular / 'secreted' product label (count of agreeing signals)
Tier2: family Core/Flexible vs its neighbors' — Flexible-among-Flexible=genomic island/HGT, Core-among-Core=ancient core function
number of independent angles supporting the leading hypothesis (drives the lead evidence grade)
SignalP probability (backs 'secreted')
SignalP predicted cleavage site
PSORTb subcellular localization
Pfam domain(s) if assigned
informative GO terms (usually empty for dark genes)
MED4 Core vs Flexible (Wang 2014) — speaks to conservation
RPKM quartile class VEG/HEG/MEG/LEG/NEG
diel amplitude / peak time / lag where present
protein detected in MED4 vesicle proteome
DOIs (+ quote) discussing the gene directly — usually empty for dark genes
function_rescued / neighborhood / coexpression / surface_secreted / lineage_novelty (may combine)
high (hard evidence and/or multi-angle convergence) / medium / low (descriptive label only)
one-line plain-language interpretation for future-omics use
